name: Halloween Worms
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg. (6 oz.) raspberry or grape flavor gelatin
1 tall container, same height as extended straws
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the gelatins in a bowl.
2. Add boiling water; stir until the gelatins completely dissolve.
3. Chill until lukewarm, about 20 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, gently pull straws to extend to full length and place them in the tall container.
5. Blend cream and food coloring with the lukewarm gelatin mixture.
6. Pour into the container, filling the straws.
7. Chill until the gelatin is firm, at least 8 hours, or cover and chill up to 2 days.
8. Pull straws from the container (if using a carton, tear the carton away from the straws).
9. Pull straws apart; run hot tap water for about 2 seconds over 3 to 4 straws at a time.
10. Starting at the empty ends, push worms from the straws with a rolling pin or use your fingers; lay worms on waxed paper-lined baking sheets.
11. Cover and chill until ready to use, at least 1 hour or up to 2 days. Worms will hold at room temperature for up to 2 hours.
Cooking Time: ~5 minutes
Prep Time: ~15 minutes, plus overnight chilling
Makes: About 100, including a few casualties
